name: GT-square-hole
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-square-hole-almost-positive (proofs/lem-square-hole-almost-positive/export.md, root node 1). For r in A=Im P (def-near-fixed-algebra) the square hole q_r=P(r^2)-r^2 satisfies, for every state seminorm omega=rho∘Phi, the DIAGONAL seminorm bound ||q_r||_omega <= C sqrt(eta) ||r||^2, with C a universal dimension-free constant. (Also q_r in Ker P, ||P(q_r^2)||<=C eta||r||^4; only the seminorm bound is imported here.)
